entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
NORTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
LOWS AROUND 50
